name: FunnelAnalysisEngine

neutralConcepts: Funnel steps must be ordered and tenant-scoped
conversionRate is computed as converted / entered, bounded [0, 1]
conversionRate cannot exceed 1.0 — validate before storing

ironRules.rule: Funnel steps must be ordered and tenant-scoped — unordered or cross-tenant funnels are rejected.
conversionRate = converted / entered, bounded [0, 1]. Values > 1.0 or < 0 are a BUILD_FAILURE.

keywords: funnel analysis engine ordered tenant scoped conversionRate bounded 0 1 converted entered FunnelAnalysisGenerated
